final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for brand "RAN QIU", a lifestyle brand embodying Eastern aesthetics and natural poetry.

Style/medium: editorial poster design, Eastern minimalism, poetic visual language with generous negative space
Composition: balanced layout with brand mark positioned elegantly, shallow depth of field aesthetic translated to 2D design
Subject: "RAN QIU" wordmark integrated with natural autumn elements—fallen leaves, dried botanicals, or organic textures
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere with golden hour tones, serene and contemplative mood
Lighting/mood: golden hour warmth, soft diffused light, tranquil and healing emotional tone
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red) as anchor, #E8DCCB (warm beige) as base, #D4A574 (golden brown) as accent, harmonious warm earth tones
Materials/textures: natural paper texture, subtle grain, organic botanical elements
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain visual balance with generous white space; color usage must follow exact hex values #8B3A1E, #E8DCCB, #D4A574
Avoid: cluttered composition; cold color temperatures; neon or artificial lighting; generic stock photo aesthetic; gradients that clash with the warm earth palette
